calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Dec-27-2011 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Change of Name of a minor.
Dept. 514, Judge: Donald J. Sullivan, Clerk: S. Vantree, CSR: L. Gillian #12355.
Petitioner RUICI LAO, mother)was present in pro per as Guardian ad Litem for the minor YANEFN TAN AND SHUFEN TAN

Cantonese Interpreter: Jenny Yau present on behalf of petitioner RUICI LAO. Petitioner and Interpreter was placed under oath and examined.

Minor's father SIMING TAN, was not present. The Court proceeds with hearing.

Proof of Publication is in the file.
No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct and sufficient, and that the petition should be granted.

The Court grants the petition for Change of Name of the Minors to YANFEN TAN to ANGELA YANFEN TAN, and SHUFEN TAN to RUBY SHUFEN TAN.
Decree Changing Name was submitted to and signed by the Court.
